description_long: This is a modern flat-screen television with a slim, rectangular profile and a minimalist design. The front features a large, high-resolution display bordered by a thin, black bezel, and it is supported by two small, angled legs at the bottom corners. The screen currently displays an architectural image with blue and white tones, suggesting vibrant color reproduction. The back of the television is matte black with subtle ventilation slots along the top edge and a central panel likely for mounting or access to ports. The sides are extremely thin, emphasizing the television's lightweight and contemporary construction. This object is suitable for placement in living rooms, public waiting areas, or urban lounges.
description: A slim, modern flat-screen television with a thin black bezel, wide display, and minimalist legs. The back is matte black with ventilation slots and a central panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display, thin black bezel, and two angled support legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extremely thin profile and the minimal depth of the television.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black back panel, ventilation slots, and support legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the television's slimness and minimal depth.
attribute_bezel_design: Thin black bezel, matte finish, minimalistic and modern styling.
